summary: Critical Infrastructure Issues Found - Backend and Frontend work locally but public URLs have routing problems

critical_bugs.issue: Public URL returns 404 for all /api/* routes while local backend works perfectly
critical_bugs.impact: Complete failure of frontend-backend integration on public URL
critical_bugs.details: Backend runs on localhost:8001 and responds correctly to all API calls, but public URL https://a6fe025d-8065-48a3-b1c3-46f7c53f601e.stage-preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404

routing_issues.description: Kubernetes ingress/proxy not routing /api requests to backend port 8001
routing_issues.evidence: Local APIs work (maintenance-status, config, auth, island), public APIs fail with 404

critical_bugs.issue: Public frontend URL shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' instead of TON City application
critical_bugs.impact: Complete failure of frontend access via public URL
critical_bugs.details: Frontend works locally on localhost:3000 but public URL shows Emergent preview unavailable page

infrastructure_issues.description: Public URL routing not working for React frontend
infrastructure_issues.evidence: Page title shows 'Emergent | Build Apps with AI' instead of 'TON City Builder'

passed_tests: Local backend /api/config works (21 business types available)
Local backend /api/auth/verify-wallet works (user registration and JWT token generation)
Local backend /api/island works (528 island cells configured)
Local frontend serves on localhost:3000 with correct TON City Builder title and HTML structure
action_item_for_main_agent: FIX CRITICAL: Configure Kubernetes ingress to route public domain /api/* requests to backend port 8001
FIX CRITICAL: Configure Kubernetes ingress to route public domain root requests to frontend port 3000
VERIFY: All /api routes should work on public URL, not just locally
VERIFY: Frontend should load TON City application on public URL, not Emergent preview page
NOTE: Backend functionality is 100% working locally - this is purely an infrastructure/routing issue

additional_notes.backend_functionality: All tested APIs work perfectly locally including maintenance, config (21 business types), auth (user creation, JWT), and island (528 cells)
additional_notes.frontend_functionality: Frontend HTML structure is correct locally with proper TON City Builder title
additional_notes.infrastructure_diagnosis: This is a Kubernetes ingress/routing configuration issue, not an application code issue
additional_notes.agent_context_note: As mentioned in testing context, external preview may be temporarily unavailable - this explains the routing failures
